seoTitle: Kangaloon vs Kangaroo Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kangaloon and Kangaroo Point. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kangaloon vs Kangaroo Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kangaloon and Kangaroo Point.
heading: Kangaloon vs Kangaroo Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kangaloon, New South Wales and Kangaroo Point, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kangaloon has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Kangaroo Point (52/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kangaloon or Kangaroo Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kangaloon has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Kangaroo Point scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kangaloon scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Kangaroo Point scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kangaloon or Kangaroo Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kangaloon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 3.23% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
